Video.summary: When a revealing magazine article about the Jump Street program is written, Hanson is suspended.
Video.title: The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins

Image.alt: The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins
The Dreaded Return Of Russell Buckins

Video.summary: Penhall and Hanson must bring a young private back to the Army base before he's charged with desertion.
Video.title: A.W.O.L.

Video.summary: Booker feels guilty knowing an innocent student has been killed because his friends mistook him for a narc.
Video.title: Nemesis

Video.summary: The team is on the verge of busting his son for drug dealing when the mayor steps in and suspends Fuller.
Video.title: Fathers And Sons

Video.summary: When drug-dealing gets out of hand at a prestigious performing arts school, the team must join the act.
Video.title: High High

Video.summary: The Jump Street cops go undercover on the streets as homeless runaways to find a missing teenager.
Video.title: Blinded By The Thousand Points Of Light

Image.alt: Blinded By The Thousand Points Of Light
Blinded By The Thousand Points Of Light
Blinded By The Thousand Points Of Light
Blinded By The Thousand Points Of Light
Blinded By The Thousand Points Of Light
Blinded By The Thousand Points Of Light
Blinded By The Thousand Points Of Light
Blinded By The Thousand Points Of Light
Blinded By The Thousand Points Of Light

Video.summary: When the controversial host of a radio show is nearly killed, Booker takes over to flush out the guilty party.
Video.title: Next Victim

Video.summary: When Hanson and loki go undercover with two rival gangs to find their weapons supplier, loki is shot.
Video.title: Loc'd Out, Part 1 / Partners, Part 1

Video.summary: Forensics proves a third gun was fired the night Tower was killed, but a jury finds Hanson guilty of murder.
Video.title: Loc'd Out, Part 2 / Partners, Part 2

Video.summary: While in the process of clearing Hanson of all charges, Booker is forced to resign.
Video.title: Draw The Line

Video.summary: Hanson and Penhall investigate student beatings at an off campus bar, discovering an illegal gambling ring.
Video.title: Say It Ain't So, Pete

Video.summary: Undercover at a nightclub, Hanson rekindles an old romance while uncovering a drug-money-laundering operation.
Video.title: Eternal Flame

Video.summary: A black market syndicate is selling El Salvadorean babies, and Penhall marries a woman about to be deported.
Video.title: Come From The Shadows

Video.summary: A principal's controversial tactics go too far in his attempt to clean up a decaying inner city school.
Video.title: God Is A Bullet

Video.summary: While investigating fires, Penhall and Hanson meet a student whose psychic powers lead them to an arsonist.
Video.title: Old Haunts In A New Age

Image.alt: Old Haunts In A New Age
Old Haunts In A New Age
Old Haunts In A New Age
Old Haunts In A New Age
Old Haunts In A New Age
Old Haunts In A New Age
Old Haunts In A New Age
Old Haunts In A New Age
Old Haunts In A New Age

Video.summary: Hanson and loki face their personal demons when they go to solve burglaries in an exclusive neighborhood.
Video.title: Out Of Control

Video.summary: While undercover as a medical student, Hoffs is raped by a fellow student but is reluctant to report the crime
Video.title: Stand By Your Man

Video.summary: Hanson and Penhall go undercover at a high school to find a lonely student, guilty of killing a teacher's wife
Video.title: Mike's P.O.V.

Video.summary: The team embark on a motorcycle trip to bust the man responsible for loki, Hanson, and Booker's misfortunes.
Video.title: Wheels And Deals, Part 2

Video.summary: While on a stake-out watching a house of suspected burglars, Hoffs witnesses a father abusing his family.
Video.title: Parental Guidance Suggested

Video.summary: loki is held at gunpoint by a young man who turned in his family for drug abuse, blaming Harry for the outcome
Video.title: Things We Said Today

Video.summary: Working to find a chemist making synthetic heroin, loki befriends a Chinese student while Hoffs is courted.
Video.title: Research And Destroy

Video.summary: Hoffs goes undercover to solve the murder of a teacher. She helps a teen witness understand her sexuality.
Video.title: A Change Of Heart

Video.summary: A police cadet in the future attempts to revive the old Jump Street program, visiting the old Jump Street cops
Video.title: Back From The Future

Video.summary: Hanson tries to convince a juvenile on death row to star in a video to help keep other youth out of jail.
After a drug overdose death of a college basketball star, Hanson and Penhall discover a point shaving scandal.
Video.title: Hi Mom
